description.value: You're an ooze! You can Climb surfaces without needing to attempt an Athletics check even if they're perfectly smooth or horizontal, such as a metal ceiling, though the GM might still require you to attempt a check to Climb while in hazardous conditions. Additionally, as long as your individual brains can fit through a gap, your whole body can ooze through it: you can move through a gap at least 2 feet wide without Squeezing and can Squeeze through a gap at least 1 foot wide.
